title: App crashes when clicking login button
body:
Whenever I click the login button after typing my password, the app completely crashes and returns a 500. 
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "auth.js", line 45
    user = await db.findOne({ email: req.body.email })
TypeError: Cannot read property 'email' of undefined

title: 500 error on POST /api/users endpoint
body:
The users endpoint is throwing a 500 internal server error when trying to create a new user without an avatar. 
Exception: null pointer exception at UserController.java:120

title: Memory leak in background worker process
body: After running for 24 hours, the background worker consumes 4GB of RAM and is eventually killed by OOM killer. We suspect the redis connection pool isn't closing properly.

title: Add dark mode support to dashboard
body: Would be great to have a dark mode toggle on the main dashboard to reduce eye strain when working at night. Can we add a simple switcher in the header?

title: Support exporting reports to CSV
body: Our accounting team needs to export the monthly billing reports to CSV so they can import them into Excel. Currently you only support PDF export.

title: Implement OAuth2 authentication
body: We should support logging in with Google and GitHub using standard OAuth2 flows to reduce friction during onboarding.

title: How do I configure environment variables?
body: I'm trying to deploy this to production but I can't figure out where to put the API keys. Do I use a .env file or do I pass them directly to docker run?

title: What's the difference between tier 1 and tier 2?
body: I'm looking at the pricing page and it's not clear what the difference is regarding the rate limits for the API. Can someone explain?

title: README missing installation instructions
body: The README.md doesn't explain how to install the new v2.0 dependencies. The `npm run setup` command fails because it's looking for a legacy package.
